'''Otranto''' was the base of the [[Church of the First Frequency]]. It was ordered to be closed by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Inquisitor/Legends|Grand Inquisitor]] [[Laddinare Torbin]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wikipedia:Otranto|Otranto]] is a city in [[Wikipedia:Italy|Italy]].
